name: confirm_any_text_and_parameter_edits_with_user
desc: Present text, parameter, specification, schedule, or report changes to the user for

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Document or section title shown in the review header, e.g. 'M&E Specification — Section 5.3 Drainage'

parameters.name: subtitle
parameters.description: Who modified and description, e.g. 'Modified by BUILD MEP agent'

parameters.name: blocks_json
parameters.description: JSON array of block diff objects: [{id,label,type,operation,oldText,newText,section}]
